TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == masatawasiay nu bala' ŤāļÁļĖÁ∂≠ŚĆĖ == masatawasiay nu bala' u kilul sananay tu dimiad a imelangan. adada' pasu utiih ku hahanhanan, nai' ku tehu a nipiuhuhan, hinatimel, mahetik ku ba'ket atu mahida patelekay a kasuy. nu nikaidawan a imelang bala a tabakiay nu hiking talakaw, mahachac ku hanhan, adada ku baluwan atu bala' a gan. 49 samala tawasi nu bala'an yadah ku sakaimelangan idaw ku namaka liklikay, nu nipatuceka a sapayuan, nikalalida " pasu COVID-19 atu sakalecad a SARS nu baydukan" atu nu laatay bala' nu imelang. hinaadih kita tu te'-fa-sin masatawasiay nu bala'an "IPF", u mahiniay caay kaw katinengan a cin-ce-sin a bala' imelangan. mahiniay a imelangan, nipilingtugingan, kinsaaan ku bala' atu sakasiicelang nu bala'an a mikinsa. ,śĄüśüď(ŚĆÖśč¨COVID-19ŚíĆÁõłťóúÁöĄSARS (IPF), . nu mahiniay a nikasa tawasiay a bala'an nu imelang caay kaw kapahfay a mingaay ku mahiniaay a imelangan, u sapingaay tina imelangan nai' hen ku tatengaay nu sapingaay. hakiya pasuyun-ku sapingaay atu mangaay ku bala'. hucunu sapayuan taneng mitaneng tu sakatenes nu kibetan. alahican taneng a sipacumud tu nutaw a bala'an. pulung nu kitakid makaala tu lima a wangan si mahiniay a imelangan. nika udip nu mahiniay a imelangan caay pilakuuyd tu lima a mihcaan. . wayway nu udip atu nina imelangťęĒŚĺĶŚíĆÁóáÁčÄ nu masatawasiay nu bala'an a adada' tada u: utiih nu hahanhanan, micidek ku timel, nai' ku teluhu a miuhuh atu huming sa nai' ku icelang, mahicaay kiya ku baluwan, pasu adada nu baluwan, caay ka asu' ku nikan atu nika a milik nika hetik nu ba'ked, nu masatawasiay nu bala'an a imelangay hinangelungelu' caay ka taneng ku hahanhanan a imelangan, yu mitengil ku misaydan sa atu taneng i sasaen nu bala'an a mitengil atu suni aca. nipaadihan i tinnaw CT anu caay ka kapah sa, nika u baluwan sasingen inai hen ku wantan sa. CT XŚÖČÁČáŚČášłćšłÄŚģö. nina imelangÁóÖŚõ† mahiniay a imelangan u cin-ce-sin balaan a adada, pasu nu udip a man-yi-sin a imelangan, nika lalidan nu bayduk atu nikalalidan nu cilekay, nu heni miadada tu pabaway nu balaan atu sasaay nu balaan malatawasi a nikasumadan, atu bala' a duma nikadukaan. . hakiya nika idawan nu masatawasiay a adada a imelangan atu adada: pasu se-mem-cen-ce-adadaan, si-huy atu mapahelakay a ci-ti nu mukinan. mikutkutay tu sumi a tademaw, balungaay a tademaw atu mi'cusay tu liken a tademaw mahiniay a tademaw ku ka balihnawan nu mita. . makawayay a bala', hina adih kita tu mahelup nu cilekay, cilekay atu aadupan a tuudan nikauningan a anabuh, mutabaku micunus tu nikaadadaan atu la'cus nu imelangan, makansicu, adada nu kulukululan, atu mahidaay u tibeni nika lebawaan, ahebet ku banges a nikakibedkibed nu adada. duma nu ngelu' atu nikakibed nu adada, patinaku makibetay a imelang atu mulangaw ku heci midepit i hikangan malalid, pasu COVID-19 nu sapayuan, u an-tan-tun, puo-lay-mei-su', pay-siw-an, cia-an-tei-in, a-pu-ma-huy- atu hu-nan-tuo-in. ,ŚĆÖśč¨COVID-19 . lingtugingan ku baluwanŤÉłťÉ®śĒĺŚįĄś≤ĽÁôā kasiimelangan ahicanÁôľÁóÖś©üŚą∂ mahida utawasiay a bala' u naw kapahay a bala' haymawsa malatawasiay a dadanan. sikibet tu ahican a malakapahay a balaan sa u yen mabuwah u caayay kaletep a tasasa, u bala' hantu mahitik tu, sisa malaadada nu bala'an. nika hida nu masatawasiay nu balaan a imelang sademiad sa a matulin muculil ahican a mangaay, sa malahamaw sa a adada. nika sumadan nu adadaan a bala mapalekal a masut ku bala', u nika satawasian nu balaan hina adih kita. huming sa atu mapucu' ku kulul atu nikasatawasian a bala'an nii' ku kanki a matiyan ku bala' a imelangan. .
S.PHON: == masatawasiaj nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° **** == masatawasiaj nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sananaj tu dimiad a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. adada Ē~ ° pasu utiińß ku ńßańßanńßanan, nai Ē~ ° ku t…ôńßu a nipiuńßuńßan, ńßinatim…ôr~…ĺ, mańß…ôtik ku ba Ē~ °k…ôt atu mańßida pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj a kasuj. nu nikaidawan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč bar~…ĺa a tabakiaj nu ńßikiŇč tar~…ĺakaw, mańßa ¶ńßa ¶ ku ńßanńßan, adada ku bar~…ĺuwan atu bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a gan. ** samar~…ĺa tawasi nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an jadańß ku sakaim…ôr~…ĺaŇčan idaw ku namaka r~…ĺikr~…ĺikaj, nu nipatu ¶…ôka a sapajuan, nikar~…ĺar~…ĺida " pasu ¶o*id-** atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a sa*s nu bajdukan" atu nu r~…ĺaataj bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. ńßinaadińß kita tu t…ô Ē~ °-fa-sin masatawasiaj nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an "ipf", u mańßiniaj ¶aaj kaw katin…ôŇčan a ¶in- ¶…ô-sin a bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, nipir~…ĺiŇčtugiŇčan, kinsaaan ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu sakasii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an a mikinsa. ,**(** ¶o*id-******sa*s (ipf), . nu mańßiniaj a nikasa tawasiaj a bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj kaw kapańßfaj a miŇčaaj ku mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, u sapiŇčaaj tina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ńß…ôn ku tat…ôŇčaaj nu sapiŇčaaj. ńßakija pasujun-ku sapiŇčaaj atu maŇčaaj ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ńßu ¶unu sapajuan tan…ôŇč mitan…ôŇč tu sakat…ôn…ôs nu kib…ôtan. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an tan…ôŇč a sipa ¶umud tu nutaw a bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. pur~…ĺuŇč nu kitakid makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a waŇčan si mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. nika udip nu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan ¶aaj pir~…ĺakuujd tu r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan. . wajwaj nu udip atu nina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč***** nu masatawasiaj nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an a adada Ē~ ° tada u: utiińß nu ńßańßanńßanan, mi ¶id…ôk ku tim…ôr~…ĺ, nai Ē~ ° ku t…ôr~…ĺuńßu a miuńßuńß atu ńßumiŇč sa nai Ē~ ° ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mańßi ¶aaj kija ku bar~…ĺuwan, pasu adada nu bar~…ĺuwan, ¶aaj ka asu Ē~ ° ku nikan atu nika a mir~…ĺik nika ńß…ôtik nu ba Ē~ °k…ôd, nu masatawasiaj nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ¶aaj ka tan…ôŇč ku ńßańßanńßanan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, ju mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ ku misajdan sa atu tan…ôŇč i sasa…ôn nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an a mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ atu suni a ¶a. nipaadińßan i tinnaw ¶t anu ¶aaj ka kapańß sa, nika u bar~…ĺuwan sasiŇč…ôn inai ńß…ôn ku wantan sa. ¶t *******. nina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč** mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan u ¶in- ¶…ô-sin bar~…ĺaan a adada, pasu nu udip a man-ji-sin a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, nika r~…ĺar~…ĺidan nu bajduk atu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, nu ńß…ôni miadada tu pabawaj nu bar~…ĺaan atu sasaaj nu bar~…ĺaan mar~…ĺatawasi a nikasumadan, atu bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a duma nikadukaan. . ńßakija nika idawan nu masatawasiaj a adada a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan atu adada: pasu s…ô-m…ôm- ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-adadaan, si-ńßuj atu mapańß…ôr~…ĺakaj a ¶i-ti nu mukinan. mikutkutaj tu sumi a tad…ômaw, bar~…ĺuŇčaaj a tad…ômaw atu mi Ē~ ° ¶usaj tu r~…ĺik…ôn a tad…ômaw mańßiniaj a tad…ômaw ku ka bar~…ĺińßnawan nu mita. . makawajaj a bar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ńßina adińß kita tu mańß…ôr~…ĺup nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj atu aadupan a tuudan nikauniŇčan a anabuńß, mutabaku mi ¶unus tu nikaadadaan atu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, makansi ¶u, adada nu kur~…ĺukur~…ĺur~…ĺan, atu mańßidaaj u tib…ôni nika r~…ĺ…ôbawaan, ańß…ôb…ôt ku baŇč…ôs a nikakib…ôdkib…ôd nu adada. duma nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° atu nikakib…ôd nu adada, patinaku makib…ôtaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu mur~…ĺaŇčaw ku ńß…ô ¶i mid…ôpit i ńßikaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid, pasu ¶o*id-** nu sapajuan, u an-tan-tun, puo-r~…ĺaj-m…ôi-su Ē~ °, paj-siw-an, ¶ia-an-t…ôi-in, a-pu-ma-ńßuj- atu ńßu-nan-tuo-in. ,** ¶o*id-** . r~…ĺiŇčtugiŇčan ku bar~…ĺuwan****** kasiim…ôr~…ĺaŇčan ańßi ¶an**** mańßida utawasiaj a bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u naw kapańßaj a bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßajmawsa mar~…ĺatawasiaj a dadanan. sikib…ôt tu ańßi ¶an a mar~…ĺakapańßaj a bar~…ĺaan sa u j…ôn mabuwańß u ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ôt…ôp a tasasa, u bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßantu mańßitik tu, sisa mar~…ĺaadada nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. nika ńßida nu masatawasiaj nu bar~…ĺaan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sad…ômiad sa a matur~…ĺin mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ańßi ¶an a maŇčaaj, sa mar~…ĺańßamaw sa a adada. nika sumadan nu adadaan a bar~…ĺa mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ a masut ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ °, u nika satawasian nu bar~…ĺaan ńßina adińß kita. ńßumiŇč sa atu mapu ¶u Ē~ ° ku kur~…ĺur~…ĺ atu nikasatawasian a bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an nii Ē~ ° ku kanki a matijan ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. .
S.FORM: == masatawasiay nu bala' ŤāļÁļĖÁ∂≠ŚĆĖ == masatawasiay nu bala' u kilul sananay tu dimiad a imelangan. adada' pasu utiih ku hahanhanan, nai' ku tehu a nipiuhuhan, hinatimel, mahetik ku ba'ket atu mahida patelekay a kasuy. nu nikaidawan a imelang bala a tabakiay nu hiking talakaw, mahachac ku hanhan, adada ku baluwan atu bala' a gan. 49 samala tawasi nu bala'an yadah ku sakaimelangan idaw ku namaka liklikay, nu nipatuceka a sapayuan, nikalalida " pasu COVID-19 atu sakalecad a SARS nu baydukan" atu nu laatay bala' nu imelang. hinaadih kita tu te'-fa-sin masatawasiay nu bala'an "IPF", u mahiniay caay kaw katinengan a cin-ce-sin a bala' imelangan. mahiniay a imelangan, nipilingtugingan, kinsaaan ku bala' atu sakasiicelang nu bala'an a mikinsa. ,śĄüśüď(ŚĆÖśč¨COVID-19ŚíĆÁõłťóúÁöĄSARS (IPF), . nu mahiniay a nikasa tawasiay a bala'an nu imelang caay kaw kapahfay a mingaay ku mahiniaay a imelangan, u sapingaay tina imelangan nai' hen ku tatengaay nu sapingaay. hakiya pasuyun-ku sapingaay atu mangaay ku bala'. hucunu sapayuan taneng mitaneng tu sakatenes nu kibetan. alahican taneng a sipacumud tu nutaw a bala'an. pulung nu kitakid makaala tu lima a wangan si mahiniay a imelangan. nika udip nu mahiniay a imelangan caay pilakuuyd tu lima a mihcaan. . wayway nu udip atu nina imelangťęĒŚĺĶŚíĆÁóáÁčÄ nu masatawasiay nu bala'an a adada' tada u: utiih nu hahanhanan, micidek ku timel, nai' ku teluhu a miuhuh atu huming sa nai' ku icelang, mahicaay kiya ku baluwan, pasu adada nu baluwan, caay ka asu' ku nikan atu nika a milik nika hetik nu ba'ked, nu masatawasiay nu bala'an a imelangay hinangelungelu' caay ka taneng ku hahanhanan a imelangan, yu mitengil ku misaydan sa atu taneng i sasaen nu bala'an a mitengil atu suni aca. nipaadihan i tinnaw CT anu caay ka kapah sa, nika u baluwan sasingen inai hen ku wantan sa. CT XŚÖČÁČáŚČášłćšłÄŚģö. nina imelangÁóÖŚõ† mahiniay a imelangan u cin-ce-sin balaan a adada, pasu nu udip a man-yi-sin a imelangan, nika lalidan nu bayduk atu nikalalidan nu cilekay, nu heni miadada tu pabaway nu balaan atu sasaay nu balaan malatawasi a nikasumadan, atu bala' a duma nikadukaan. . hakiya nika idawan nu masatawasiay a adada a imelangan atu adada: pasu se-mem-cen-ce-adadaan, si-huy atu mapahelakay a ci-ti nu mukinan. mikutkutay tu sumi a tademaw, balungaay a tademaw atu mi'cusay tu liken a tademaw mahiniay a tademaw ku ka balihnawan nu mita. . makawayay a bala', hina adih kita tu mahelup nu cilekay, cilekay atu aadupan a tuudan nikauningan a anabuh, mutabaku micunus tu nikaadadaan atu la'cus nu imelangan, makansicu, adada nu kulukululan, atu mahidaay u tibeni nika lebawaan, ahebet ku banges a nikakibedkibed nu adada. duma nu ngelu' atu nikakibed nu adada, patinaku makibetay a imelang atu mulangaw ku heci midepit i hikangan malalid, pasu COVID-19 nu sapayuan, u an-tan-tun, puo-lay-mei-su', pay-siw-an, cia-an-tei-in, a-pu-ma-huy- atu hu-nan-tuo-in. ,ŚĆÖśč¨COVID-19 . lingtugingan ku baluwanŤÉłťÉ®śĒĺŚįĄś≤ĽÁôā kasiimelangan ahicanÁôľÁóÖś©üŚą∂ mahida utawasiay a bala' u naw kapahay a bala' haymawsa malatawasiay a dadanan. sikibet tu ahican a malakapahay a balaan sa u yen mabuwah u caayay kaletep a tasasa, u bala' hantu mahitik tu, sisa malaadada nu bala'an. nika hida nu masatawasiay nu balaan a imelang sademiad sa a matulin muculil ahican a mangaay, sa malahamaw sa a adada. nika sumadan nu adadaan a bala mapalekal a masut ku bala', u nika satawasian nu balaan hina adih kita. huming sa atu mapucu' ku kulul atu nikasatawasian a bala'an nii' ku kanki a matiyan ku bala' a imelangan. .

nipiuńßuńßan, ńßinatim…ôr~…ĺ, mańß…ôtik ku ba Ē~ °k…ôt atu mańßida pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj a kasuj. nu nikaidawan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč bar~…ĺa a tabakiaj nu ńßikiŇč tar~…ĺakaw, mańßa ¶ńßa ¶ ku ńßanńßan, adada ku nu bajduk atu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, nu ńß…ôni miadada tu pabawaj nu bar~…ĺaan atu sasaaj nu bar~…ĺaan mar~…ĺatawasi a nikasumadan, atu bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a duma nikadukaan. . ńßakija nika idawan nu masatawasiaj a adada a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan atu adada: pasu s…ô-m…ôm- ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-adadaan, si-ńßuj atu mapańß…ôr~…ĺakaj a ¶i-ti nu mukinan. mikutkutaj tu sumi a tad…ômaw, bar~…ĺuŇčaaj a tad…ômaw atu mi Ē~ ° ¶usaj tu r~…ĺik…ôn a tad…ômaw mańßiniaj a tad…ômaw ku ka bar~…ĺińßnawan nu mita. . makawajaj a bar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ńßina adińß kita tu mańß…ôr~…ĺup nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj atu aadupan a tuudan nikauniŇčan a anabuńß, mutabaku mi ¶unus tu nikaadadaan atu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, makansi ¶u, adada nu kur~…ĺukur~…ĺur~…ĺan, atu mańßidaaj u tib…ôni nika r~…ĺ…ôbawaan, ańß…ôb…ôt ku baŇč…ôs a nikakib…ôdkib…ôd nu adada. duma nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° atu nikakib…ôd nu adada, patinaku makib…ôtaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu mur~…ĺaŇčaw ku ńß…ô ¶i mid…ôpit i ńßikaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid, pasu ¶o*id-** nu sapajuan, u an-tan-tun, puo-r~…ĺaj-m…ôi-su Ē~ °, paj-siw-an, ¶ia-an-t…ôi-in, a-pu-ma-ńßuj- atu ńßu-nan-tuo-in. ,** ¶o*id-** . r~…ĺiŇčtugiŇčan ku bar~…ĺuwan****** kasiim…ôr~…ĺaŇčan ańßi ¶an**** mańßida utawasiaj a bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u naw kapańßaj a bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßajmawsa mar~…ĺatawasiaj a dadanan. sikib…ôt tu ańßi ¶an a mar~…ĺakapańßaj a bar~…ĺaan sa u j…ôn mabuwańß u ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ôt…ôp a tasasa, u bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßantu mańßitik tu, sisa mar~…ĺaadada nu bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. nika ńßida nu masatawasiaj nu bar~…ĺaan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sad…ômiad sa a matur~…ĺin mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ańßi ¶an a maŇčaaj, sa mar~…ĺańßamaw sa a adada. nika sumadan nu adadaan a bar~…ĺa mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ a masut ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ °, u nika satawasian nu bar~…ĺaan ńßina adińß kita. ńßumiŇč sa atu mapu ¶u Ē~ ° ku kur~…ĺur~…ĺ atu nikasatawasian a bar~…ĺa Ē~ °an nii Ē~ ° ku kanki a matijan ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. .
